field.name: successLoginScreen
field.matchText: ENTER THE NUMBER OF THE DESIRED SYSTEM

field.name: successLoginScreen
field.matchText: ENTER THE NUMBER OF THE DESIRED SYSTEM

field.name: ASAPMenuScreen
field.matchText: ENTER THE NUMBER OF THE DESIRED SYSTEM

field.name: successLoginScreen
field.matchText: ENTER THE NUMBER OF THE DESIRED SYSTEM

field.name: ASAPMenuScreen
field.matchText: ENTER THE NUMBER OF THE DESIRED SYSTEM

field.name: bannerT
field.matchText: F R E I G H T M A N A G E M E N T

message.name: SR_SUCCESS
message.msg: PRESS ENTER TO VIEW PRODUCT DETAIL*

message.name: Prod_SUCCESS
message.msg: PRESS ENTER TO VIEW DISCOUNT DETAIL*

message.name: Last_Detail_Screen
message.msg: PRESS CLEAR TO RETURN TO ENTRY SCREEN

message.name: TR_SUCCESS
message.msg: PRESS ENTER KEY TO PROCEED*|PRESS CLEAR TO RETURN TO ENTRY SCREEN*

message.name: MORE_PRODUCTS
message.msg: PRESS ENTER TO VIEW MORE PRODUCTS

message.name: NO_MORE_PRODUCTS
message.msg: PRESS ENTER TO VIEW CHARGES/ALLOWANCES DETAIL*

message.name: MORE_CHGS_ALL
message.msg: PRESS ENTER TO VIEW CHARGES/ALLOWANCES DETAIL*

message.name: NO_MORE_CHGS_ALL
message.msg: PRESS CLEAR TO RETURN TO ENTRY SCREEN

message.name: EDIT_CODE_MESSAGE
message.msg: S00007: ENTER 'A'DD/'C'HANGE/'D'ELETE TO MODIFY DATA OR PRESS PF8 TO PAGE FWD

message.name: INVALID_COD_INDICATOR
message.msg: F05500: COD INDICATOR MUST BE 'Y'ES OR 'N'O

message.name: INVALID_ORIGIN_TERMINAL
message.msg: F00001: REQUIRED ENTRY, ORIGIN TERMINAL DOES NOT HAVE P&D CHARACTERISTICS

message.name: INVALID_SHIPDATE
message.msg: F00002: REQUIRED ENTRY, INVALID SHIP DATE

message.name: INVALID_PAYMENTCODE
message.msg: F00014: PAYMENT CODE MUST BE 'C'OLLECT OR 'P'REPAID

message.name: RATING_SUCCESS
message.msg: R00000: AUTO RATING COMPLETED NORMALLY*|R00086: COMPUTED KEYWORD LINE CHARGE WAS ZERO*

message.name: MANUAL_RATING_SUCCESS
message.msg: BR0301: ONE OR MORE OF THE PRODUCTS ON THIS SHIPMENT REQUIRES MA*|BR0322: NO BASING CONTROL RECORD FOR THE BUREAU CLASS RATE TARIF*|R00066: DSI BASE RATE PLUS DID NOT RETURN ANY RATES*|BR0371: NO RATES FOUND FOR AT LEAST ONE PRODUCT ON THIS SHIPMENT*|BR0325: CLASS RATES REQUIRED BUT NONE COULD BE FOUND IN EFFECT*|BR0321: NO PARTICIPATION IN A BUREAU CLASS TARIFF*

message.name: HANDLING_UNITS_NOT_EQUAL
message.msg: F05462: DETAIL HANDLING UNITS NOT EQUAL TOTAL HANDLING UNITS

message.name: TOP_OF_BILL
message.msg: F02000: CURRENTLY AT TOP OF BILL

message.name: END_OF_ACCOUNTS
message.msg: AT END OF FILE, NO MORE RECORDS*

message.name: NO_DISC_RECORDS
message.msg: REQUESTED RECORD NOT FOUND ON FILE*

message.name: SUCCESS_INQUIRY
message.msg: INQUIRY SUCCESSFUL*|INQUIRY NEXT SUCCESSFUL*|INQUIRY PREVIOUS SUCCESSFUL*

field.name: discountMinChgDiscMaxWeight
field.matchText: DISCOUNT MIN CHG DISC MAX WEIGHT

field.name: flrMinEffectiveDateCancelDate
field.matchText: FLR MIN EFFECTIVE DATE CANCEL DATE

message.name: INQUIRE_SUCCESS
message.msg: INQUIRY SUCCESSFUL*|INQUIRY NEXT SUCCESSFUL*|INQUIRY PREVIOUS SUCCESSFUL*

message.name: NO_DISC_RECORDS
message.msg: REQUESTED RECORD NOT FOUND ON FILE*

message.name: RECORD_NOT_FOUND
message.msg: REQUESTED RECORD NOT FOUND ON FILE

message.name: INQUIRE_SUCCESS
message.msg: INQUIRY SUCCESSFUL*|INQUIRY NEXT SUCCESSFUL*|INQUIRY PREVIOUS SUCCESSFUL*

message.name: ERR_ADD_RECORD_EXISTS
message.msg: UNABLE TO "ADD", RECORD ALREADY EXISTS ON FILE

message.name: INQUIRE_SUCCESS
message.msg: INQUIRY SUCCESSFUL*|INQUIRY NEXT SUCCESSFUL*|INQUIRY PREVIOUS SUCCESSFUL*

message.name: INQUIRY_SUCCESS
message.msg: INQUIRY SUCCESSFUL*|MORE RECORDS FOR SHIP POINT*

message.name: PREV_SUCCESS

message.name: NEXT_SUCCESS

message.name: INQUIRE_SUCCESS
message.msg: INQUIRY SUCCESSFUL*|INQUIRY NEXT SUCCESSFUL*|INQUIRY PREVIOUS SUCCESSFUL*

field.name: updtMsg
field.matchText: THESE FIELDS WERE UPDATED*|NO FIELDS WERE CHANGED ON THIS SCREEN*

field.name: ready4Update
field.matchText: PRESS PF6 TO UPDATE*|NO FIELDS WERE CHANGED ON THIS SCREEN*

message.name: ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND
message.msg: NON-NUMERIC CUSTOMER NUMBER*|INVALID CUSTOMER NUMBER*|NO CUSTOMER NUMBER ENTERED*|REQUESTED DATA NOT FOUND.*

message.name: NO_DISC_RECORDS
message.msg: NO DISCOUNT RECORDS SET UP*|NO DISCOUNT FOR SHIP DATE ENTERED*|NO DISCOUNT FOR DATE ENTERED*|NO DISCOUNT FOR DATE ENTERED*

message.name: DATE_SEG_NO_MORE_PREVIOUS
message.msg: NO DISCOUNT BEFORE THE ONE DISPLAYED*

message.name: DATE_SEG_NO_MORE_AFTER
message.msg: NO DISCOUNT AFTER THE ONE DISPLAYED*

message.name: NEW_DT_SEGMENT
message.msg: DISCOUNT REPEATED AS NEW DISCOUNT*|DISCOUNT REPEATED, REPLACED EXISTING*|THESE FIELDS WERE UPDATED*

message.name: END_DT_B4_SRT_DT
message.msg: END DATE MUST BE AFTER START DATE

message.name: OVERLAP_DT
message.msg: NEW DATE WILL OVERLAP EXISTING DISCOUNT

message.name: FLD_NOT_NUM
message.msg: FIELD IS NOT NUMERIC*|THE VALUE ENTERED IS NOT VALID*

message.name: ACCT_TRANSITIONED
message.msg: EDD ACCT FOR SHIP DTE ENTERED

message.name: ACCT_LOCKED
message.msg: ACCT IN TRANSIT TO EDD FOR DATE ENTERED*|IN TRANSIT TO EDD - UPD NOT ALLOWED*

message.msg: NON-NUMERIC CUSTOMER NUMBER*|INVALID CUSTOMER NUMBER*|NO CUSTOMER NUMBER ENTERED*|REQUESTED DATA NOT FOUND.*

message.msg: NO DISCOUNT RECORDS SET UP*|NO DISCOUNT FOR SHIP DATE ENTERED*|NOT A XOPCO CUSTOMER*|NO DISCOUNTS CURRENTLY IN EFFECT*|NON-US XOPCO CUSTOMER*|NO DISCOUNT FOR DATE ENTERED*

message.msg: NO DISCOUNT BEFORE THE ONE DISPLAYED*

message.name: DATE_SEG_NO_MORE_AFTER
message.msg: NO DISCOUNTS CURRENTLY IN EFFECT*|NOT A XOPCO CUSTOMER*

message.msg: EDD ACCT FOR SHIP DTE ENTERED

message.name: ACCT_LOCKED

field.matchText: THESE FIELDS WERE UPDATED*|NO FIELDS WERE CHANGED ON THIS SCREEN*

field.name: ready4Update2
field.matchText: CHANGING GRACE AND/OR ED AGGR MAY AFFECT THRESHOLD*

message.name: DS_CREATED_ADD_DATA
message.msg: ENTER NEW DISCOUNT INFORMATION*|XOPCO PRICING EXISTS FOR CUSTOMER*

message.name: END_DT_B4_SRT_DT
message.msg: END DATE MUST BE AFTER START DATE

message.name: NEW_DT_SEGMENT
message.msg: DISCOUNT REPEATED AS NEW DISCOUNT*|DISCOUNT REPEATED, REPLACED EXISTING*

message.name: OVERLAP_DT
message.msg: NEW DATE WILL OVERLAP EXISTING DISCOUNT

message.name: FLD_NOT_NUM
message.msg: FIELD IS NOT NUMERIC*|THE VALUE ENTERED IS NOT VALID*

message.name: E1_FREEZE
message.msg: USE PF5 TO SETUP TO ADD DISCOUNT*

message.name: ACCT_TRANSITIONED
message.msg: EDD ACCT FOR SHIP DTE ENTERED

message.name: ACCT_LOCKED
message.msg: ACCT IN TRANSIT TO EDD FOR DATE ENTERED*|IN TRANSIT TO EDD - UPD NOT ALLOWED*

message.name: PROGRAM_NOT_FOUND
message.msg: PROGRAM CODE WITH THIS EFF DATE NOT AVAILABLE*

message.name: END_PAGING
message.msg: FORWARD PAGING LIMIT EXCEEDED*|PF8 INVALID - ALREADY AT LAST PAGE*

message.name: FINAL_PAGE
message.msg: PRESS ENTER KEY TO START OVER*

message.name: ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND
message.msg: CUSTOMER NUMBER IS NOT ON FILE$|Customer Number is invalid$

message.name: SUCC_UPDT
message.msg: SUCCESSFUL UPDATE$|An update was requested, but no changes were made.$

message.name: COMP_NM_MISSING_BUS_ACCT
message.msg: COMPANY NAME IS MISSING FOR BUSINESS ACCOUNT$

message.name: ZIP_CODE_NOT_FOUND
message.msg: ZIP CODE NOT FOUND IN DATABASE$

message.name: NA_AREA_CODES_0_1
message.msg: NORTH AMERICAN AREA CODES CANNOT START WITH A '0' OR '1'$

message.name: PH_7_DIGITS_NA
message.msg: PHONE NUMBER MUST BE 7 DIGITS FOR CUSTS USING NO. AMER. PHONE NBR PLANS$

message.name: PH_AREA_3_DIGITS_NA
message.msg: PHONE AREA CODE SHOULD BE 3 DIGITS FOR CUSTS USING NO. AMER. PHONE NBRS$

message.name: INSUFFICIENT_ADDR_MATCH
message.msg: INSUFFICIENT \(OR BLANK\) ADDRESS INFORMATION FOR A MATCH$

message.name: VER_CITY_STATE_ZIP
message.msg: VERIFY STREET FOR CITY, STATE & ZIP$

message.name: HOUSE_NUMBER_NOT_FOUND
message.msg: HOUSE/BOX NUMBER NOT FOUND ON STREET$

message.name: DENIED_FLAG
message.msg: THIS FIELD MAY NOT BE CHANGED WHEN DENIED FLAG = Y$

message.name: SECURITY_ADMIN_EXC
message.msg: CANNOT CHANGE STATUS OF ACCOUNT - CONTACT YOUR SECURITY ADMINISTRATOR$

message.name: ADDGRND_SUCC
message.msg: SUCCESSFUL GROUND ADD*|Bill-To name/address is different from Shipper name/address*|SEE SPECIAL COMMENTS FOR THIS CUSTOMER*

message.name: ADDGRND_ALREADYLINKED
message.msg: EXPRESS ACCOUNT ALREADY LINKED TO GROUND ACCOUNT*

message.name: ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND
message.msg: NO RECORD FOR THIS CUSTOMER NUMBER ON DATABASE CEB20P$|CUSTOMER NUMBER NOT FOUND PLEASE RE-ENTER$

message.name: SUCC_UPDT
message.msg: SUCCESSFULLY UPDATED*|ANY EXISTING DISCOUNTS*|SUCCESSFUL UPDATE$|NO CHANGES MADE

message.name: ED_EXC
message.msg: CANNOT UPDATE : CUSTOMER HAS EARNED DISCOUNTS*

message.name: MISC_ERRORS
message.msg: NOT AUTHORIZED - EMP ID NOT FOUND ON TBL|CURRENT TABLE EXISTS. RECORD CANNOT BE ADDED|HEAVYWEIGHT BASE NOT SAME ON OCZDATA|TABLE ID INVALID|NO RECORD ON OCZDATA|G3PP TABLE ID NOT FOUND IN G3PP COUNTRY ZONE|ABP730 BATCH RATING IS RUNNING

message.name: ADD_CONFIRM
message.msg: (SPL RATE SCALE USED BY ")..(" FOR EXPORT ENTER "Y" TO CONFIRM REQUEST.)

message.name: RECORD_NOT_FOUND
message.msg: RECORD NOT FOUND$|INVALID RATE SCALE ENTERED$

message.name: MISC_ERRORS
message.msg: START DATE MUST BE LATER THAN MOST CURRENT RECORD|TO DATA OVERLAPS WITH EXISTING|\*CURRENT OR FUTURE RECORD EXISTS|RATE TABLE MUST EXIST BEFORE INDEX CAN BE ADDED|INVALID RATE SCALE ENTERED|RECORD NOT FOUND|CANNOT MODIFY WHILE INTL. RATING IS RUNNING|RATE TABLE MUST EXIST BEFORE INDEX CAN BE ADDED

message.name: INVALID_COD_INDICATOR
message.msg: F05500: COD INDICATOR MUST BE 'Y'ES OR 'N'O

message.name: INVALID_ORIGIN_TERMINAL
message.msg: F00001: REQUIRED ENTRY, ORIGIN TERMINAL DOES NOT HAVE P&D CHARACTERISTICS

message.name: INVALID_SHIPDATE
message.msg: F00002: REQUIRED ENTRY, INVALID SHIP DATE

message.name: INVALID_PAYMENTCODE
message.msg: F00014: PAYMENT CODE MUST BE 'C'OLLECT OR 'P'REPAID

message.name: RATING_SUCCESS
message.msg: R00000: AUTO RATING COMPLETED NORMALLY*|R00086: COMPUTED KEYWORD LINE CHARGE WAS ZERO*|F20004: BILL SENT TO AUTORATE

message.name: MANUAL_RATING_SUCCESS
message.msg: BR0301: ONE OR MORE OF THE PRODUCTS ON THIS SHIPMENT REQUIRES MA*|BR0322: NO BASING CONTROL RECORD FOR THE BUREAU CLASS RATE TARIF*|R00066: DSI BASE RATE PLUS DID NOT RETURN ANY RATES*|BR0371: NO RATES FOUND FOR AT LEAST ONE PRODUCT ON THIS SHIPMENT*|BR0325: CLASS RATES REQUIRED BUT NONE COULD BE FOUND IN EFFECT*|BR0321: NO PARTICIPATION IN A BUREAU CLASS TARIFF*|Manual rate pro

message.name: HANDLING_UNITS_NOT_EQUAL
message.msg: F05462: DETAIL HANDLING UNITS NOT EQUAL TOTAL HANDLING UNITS

message.name: TOP_OF_BILL
message.msg: F02000: CURRENTLY AT TOP OF BILL

message.name: CLASS_CODE_MISSING
message.msg: R00069: ONE OR MORE CLASS CODES INVALID OR MISSING FROM BILL

message.name: PRO_NOT_FOUND
message.msg: F20000: NEXT PRO NOT FOUND ON QUEUE

message.name: OPERATOR_ON_BILL
message.msg: F20002: THIS BILL IS CURRENTLY BEING UPDATED BY ANOTHER OPERATOR

message.name: TRFA_TRFB_NOT_PRESENT
message.msg: F13051: 'TRFA' OR 'TRFB' KEYWORD MUST BE PRESENT*

message.name: LINES_MUST_BE_RATED
message.msg: F13050: ALL LINES MUST BE RATED BEFORE POSTING BILL

message.name: DETAIL_CHGS_NOT_EQUAL
message.msg: DETAIL CHARGES DOES NOT EQUAL TOTAL CHARGES

message.name: SHIP_ADDRESS_REQ
message.msg: F05160: SHIPPER ADDRESS LINE 1 OR ADDRESS LINE 2 REQUIRED
